titleStmt.title: SII 38.372: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 372. (A.R. No. 372 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the north wall, first prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Kṛishṇadeva Mahārāya Year: Śaka 1431, Śukla, Makara, śu. 10, Sunday, Tiruvōṇam = 23 September 1509 A.D. However the above set of dates tally with Kaṉṉi not with Makara.

summary.p: Records that Tirumalai-nāyakkar, son of Ettappa-nāyakkar, Gurukkaḷ, (priests), trustees (tāṉattār) devotees (māyēśvarars) and weaving merchants (kaikkōḷa-mudaḷigal) granted a piece of land (called) Siṅgayerāvuttar-tāṅgal located in the hamlet of Kayilāyam, which was owned by the temple (Śūpaṇḍārakkāṇi) of Tirumalaruḍaiyanayiṉār temple at Dēvakkapuram, a dēvasthānam in Murugamaṅgalappaṟṟu (situated) next to Rājagambhīranmalai, as kāṇiyākshi to Tiruppaṇi Vasavaṇa-uḍaiyar for the merit of the ruler Kṛishṇadeva Mahārāya. It further records that the donee was free to cultivate the land and grow crops of his choice. Besides this he was also to receive four kalam of paddy from the temple treasury.
It seems that the donee was to measure out certain amount of produce at the temple treasury to meet the expenditure of the temple worship.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhammaśtu śrīmaṉmakāmaṇṭalecurametiṉi micura kaṇṭa kaṭṭāri cāḷuva śrīvirappiṟutāpa kikṣaṇaitevamakāyirāyar piṟutiviyirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāṟtam 1000 4 100 3 10 1 mel cellā niṉṟa cukki
lavaruṣattu makaranāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu tecamiyum nāyaṟṟuk kiḻamaiyum tiruvoṇattunāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu palkuṉṟa koṭṭattu melkuṉṟanāṭu yirācakempiraṉmalaikku
Aṭutta paṟṟu murukamaṅkalappaṟṟu tevastāṉu tevakkā[ yum] tirumalar Uṭaiya nāyiṉār śrīpaṇṭārakkāṇi Āṉa kayilāyattil piṟivu ciṅkarāvuttar tāṅkal tiruppaṇi vacavaṇauṭaiyaāṟku kiṣṇa teva
makāyirāyaṟku taṉmam Āka Ettappanāyakkar kumarar tirumalai nāyakkarum kurukkaḷum tāṉattārum māyecurarum kaikkoḷa mutalikaḷum kāṇiākṣipaṇṇik kuṭuttapaṭi tiruppaṇi Atikkattukku yilak
kaikku cilavāka ciṅkayirāvuttar tāṅkal nañcai puñcai nāṟpāṟkellai[ yum] yivar veṇṭum payirceytu koḷḷak kaṭaivar Ākavum yinta tāṅkal niṅkalāka koyil paṇṭārattile
mātam nāṟkala nellum paṟṟi varakkaṭaivar Ākavum yintak kāṇi Ākṣi cantiṟāyittavaraiyu naṭattakaṭaivar Ākavum yinta taṉmattukku yiyātoruvar ĀkutamRead akutampaṇṇiṉavarkaḷ
keṅkaikaraiyile kārāmpacuvaik koṉṟa pāvattile pokakkaṭaivar Ākavum svadattāddpaguṇam pūṇyam paradattānapaālanam paradattāpahāreṇa sva
nmattanniṣpalam bhavet svattām paradatta vāyohareta vasundharām ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyā jjāyatekrimi dānapālanayormmaddhye dānā cyeyona pālanam dānāsvarga
mayāpnoti pālanādacutam padam .
Digital edition of SII 38.372 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
